{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Lowgold participants
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|There are five hundred and fifty-two [[Lowgold participants]] in the application process.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
